creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
r314983 added 'Sponsored by:' to the FreeBSD template prefix array
without incrementing the defined number of elements in the array.  The
effect is that the 'Sponsored by:' field is added to the commit log
template but is never removed.

Fix: The attached patch increments the array element count in the fbsd
template patch to catch up with addition of the new field.  Whether or
not to bump PORTREVISION in the port's Makefile is left as an exercise
for the committer.
How-To-Repeat: 
Commit using the subversion port built since r314983; including the
FreeBSD template; and notice that 'Sponsored by:' becomes a permanent
feature of every commit log message.
